queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability in consumer lending.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default risk associated with negative checking account balances and their empirical correlation with lower credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: between 4 and 7 years.
queries.question: The impact of medium-term employment duration on credit risk drivers and its empirical association with decreased default probability in retail lending.
